title: lavandula brevidens var. mesatlantica
intro: Lavandula brevidens var. mesatlantica, also known as dwarf English lavender, is a variety of the lavender plant that is native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Lavandula brevidens var. mesatlantica include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation and sleep, and alleviating symptoms of digestive issues. The herbal preparations of this plant include essential oils, teas, and infusions, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
